name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave
syntax: long coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyRemoteSlave( dword vendorId, dword productCode, dword revisionNoLow, dword revisionNoHigh, dword serialNoLow, dword serialNoHigh );
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions and sends a response if a request is received.

parameters.name: revisionNoLow
parameters.description: Low boundary of the revision number.

parameters.name: revisionNoHigh
parameters.description: High boundary of the revision number.

parameters.name: serialNoLow
parameters.description: Low boundary of the serial number.

parameters.name: serialNoHigh
parameters.description: High boundary of the serial number.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
